title: Tick Control Pelham
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Pelham, Westchester. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Expert treatment from $125 - $325. Call today!
intro: Pelham's tree-lined streets, proximity to parks like Pelham Bay Park, and abundant green spaces create ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Pelham Manor and Pelham to protect your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our targeted treatment plans are designed specifically for Westchester properties, ensuring year-round protection.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Westchester County, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique tick challenges facing Pelham residents. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while effectively eliminating ticks from your yard, and we offer seasonal maintenance plans to keep your property protected throughout the year.
localContext: Pelham's historic neighborhoods, beautiful Colonial and Tudor-style homes with expansive lawns, and proximity to wooded areas make tick prevention essential for homeowners. Properties near Shore Park, the Hutchinson River Parkway corridor, and the many walking paths throughout both Pelham Manor and Pelham require vigilant tick management to ensure safe outdoor enjoyment.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Pelham?
faqs.answer: In Pelham and throughout Westchester County, tick season typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active any time temperatures are above freezing, so year-round vigilance is important. We recommend starting preventative treatments in early spring before tick populations peak.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Pelham?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Pelham range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size, the severity of the infestation, and the frequency of treatments needed. We offer single applications as well as seasonal packages that include multiple treatments throughout the year for comprehensive protection. We provide free estimates and can customize a plan to fit your budget and needs.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are specifically designed to be safe for families and pets when applied according to label directions. Our technicians are trained in proper application techniques to minimize exposure. We typically recommend keeping children and pets off treated areas until they are dry, usually 2-4 hours, after which normal activity can resume safely.

faqs.question: How often should I have my Pelham property treated for ticks?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection, we recommend a minimum of three treatments per year: early spring (April/May), early summer (June), and late summer/early fall (August/September). Properties with heavy vegetation, wooded borders, or high deer traffic may benefit from monthly treatments during peak season. Our technicians will assess your specific property and recommend a treatment schedule based on your risk factors and budget.
